# useScreenSafeArea

Reactive

**Package:** `@vueuse/core`
**Category:** Browser

## Usage

```ts
import { useScreenSafeArea } from '@vueuse/core'

const {
  top,
  right,
  bottom,
  left,
} = useScreenSafeArea()
```

## Returns

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
| top | `shallowRef` |
| right | `shallowRef` |
| bottom | `shallowRef` |
| left | `shallowRef` |
| update | `Ref` |
